name: WAI-ARIA APG Listbox Pattern
notes: Defines listbox as a visible list of selectable options, with single-select and multi-select variants, option naming constraints, grouped options, focus versus selection, selection-follows-focus tradeoffs, typeahead, Home and End, aria-activedescendant, aria-multiselectable, aria-selected or aria-checked, and cautions against interactive elements inside options.
